content.text:
Step 1: Distance of each part
- First part: 60 mph × 2 h = 120 miles
- Second part: 80 mph × 1 h = 80 miles

Step 2: Total distance and total time
- Total distance = 120 + 80 = 200 miles
- Total time = 2 h + 1 h = 3 h

Step 3: Average speed
- Average speed = total distance / total time = 200 miles / 3 hours = 66 2/3 mph ≈ 66.67 mph

Answer: 66 2/3 mph.
